description: Unified evidence bundle aggregating differential test harnesses from G04, G05, G08, and G09 gate completions. The suite fails closed until the G04 slash-command differential runner executes both Rust Pi and pi-mono.

component_evidence.description: Slash command differential coverage is not certified: the harness currently fails closed because the real Rust Pi/pi-mono RPC runner is not implemented.
evidence_artifacts: tests/dropin_slash_differential.rs asserts that synthetic differential success is forbidden
tests/dropin_slash_differential/mod.rs returns success=false with DIFFERENTIAL_RUNNER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED for every scenario
Comprehensive CLI edge case coverage (tests/cli_edge_cases.rs) is supporting coverage only, not differential parity evidence

component_evidence.description: RPC command semantics and event stream differential testing with 96.6% success rate
Session JSONL schema and hostcall error taxonomy parity verification
Tool stdio, process lifecycle, file/search I/O, and streaming behavior parity
evidence_artifacts: 41 tool scenarios across 5 surfaces (bash, file, search, streaming, truncation)

surfaces_covered: CLI slash commands (fail-closed: differential runner not implemented)

acceptance_evidence.criterion: All four differential gate evidence bundles present and valid
acceptance_evidence.evidence: G04 slash_command_differential is present but explicitly fail-closed until the real Rust Pi/pi-mono runner is implemented

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Differential test harnesses cover critical interaction surfaces
acceptance_evidence.evidence: CLI slash-command scenarios return DIFFERENTIAL_RUNNER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED and cannot be counted as pass evidence

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Canonicalization rules documented for cross-platform stability
acceptance_evidence.evidence: 15+ canonicalization rules documented across timing, PIDs, paths, and event boundaries
G10 remains blocked by gap-cli-slash-command-surface until slash_command_differential reports real mirrored execution
